description: Grouped card list that organizes items by a categorical field. Items are clustered under collapsible category headers with count badges, creating a two-level hierarchy lighter than nested_sections. Ideal for sections with a natural type/category/domain grouping field.

title_field.description: Field name for the item title

group_field.description: Field name to group items by

badge_field.description: Optional field for an additional badge on each item

section_description.description: Optional description shown above the groups
